feat.name: Scoundrel's Surprise
feat.text: You drop your disguise at the right moment and surprise your target. After you Impersonate someone else using a disguise kit, you can remove your disguise with a dramatic gesture. Any creatures that previously failed to see through your disguise are off-guard against the next attack you make before the end of your turn.

traits.name: Manipulate
traits.text: You must physically manipulate an item or make gestures to use an action with this trait. Creatures without a suitable appendage can’t perform actions with this trait. Manipulate actions often trigger reactions.

traits.name: Rogue
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the rogue class.
